emails.subject: Enron Corp.'s "preferred" masters
emails.body: Enron Corp.'s "preferred" masters Bill and Tanya: Clint would like to finalize Lehman and CSFB, in that order. We are in the midst of transferrring a swap from Merrill to Lehman. Thanks for your help. Sara

emails.subject: Enron Corp.'s "preferred" masters
emails.body: Further to my earlier message, Deutsche Bank is third on the list. Thanks. Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 10/25/2000 04:51 PM Sara Shackleton 10/25/2000 02:15 PM

emails.subject: Re: Enron Corp.'s "preferred" masters
emails.body: Re: Enron Corp.'s "preferred" masters I think I have put this in the hands of someone who can get things done....Tanya Rohauer. Bill From: Sara Shackleton on 10/25/2000 04:53 PM
